text_excerpt: Speeches and Presentations Archives - Ros Altmann Ros Altmann Home Profile Latest Publications Press Release ROS ALTMANN Ros is a leading authority on later life issues, including pensions, social care and retirement policy. Numerous major awards have recognised her work to demystify finance and make pensions work better for people. She was the UK Pensions Minister from 2015 – 16 and is a member of the House of Lords where she sits as Baroness Altmann of Tottenham. Ros Altmann Ros Altmann Home Profile Latest Publications Press Release Toggle navigation Home Profile Latest Publications Press Release Ros Altmann Home Profile Latest Publications Press Release Browsed by Category: Speeches and Presentations Baroness Ros Altmann tackles ageism in job search market Baroness Ros Altmann tackles ageism in job search market November 27, 2025 Ros Altmann the Jewish News highlights Ros’ presentation to the charity ‘Resource’ and her comments about ongoing ageism that can prevent many older people from even being considered for new employment roles. Discussing the March 2021 Budget, trends to ESG, impact of interest rates and pension tax relief reforms. What will happen next?
